textByHash.316b5a7db5699fd885817bec29b6a02b86c2d86c: Yo ho ho and a Jolly Roger to you, me hearty! I can see from the fact that you're totally drenched from head to toe that you are a fellow scallywag sailor! The name's Steve Beanie! Pleased to meet you.
textByHash.f830ada28b0651e5ba061d0ec3d98ec5e3f9df2c: Ha! Far from it, matey! Though the fever dream I can't comment on. They're rather common around here... but I assure you that it's well-nigh certainly like enough most likely not the rum doing it!
textByHash.d6957c874a1abe81091079668a41c4b370267dc0: Ah, me wee hearty! You seem to be having quite the crisis! Thankfully, you've rigged the starboard and docked yourself at the right port! Welcome to the Pandemonium!
textByHash.81b6b48a2087e046e4e64e050deeb8b76ab96f6c: Aye! To be sure! This here is the finest establishment in all the seas. Sit back! Have a drink! Let the good times, and the rum, flow!
textByHash.a7886c9d43df69cf778f99f0131c1780f95f8c2e: Avast ye! You name a pair of pinching looting plundering seadogs!
textByHash.c4e2600f3b33ead4a2a55ec14ec0b1c45b646d0a: Purchased?! Purchased?! You're pulling my leg, you scallywag! Those scurvy dogs came here and broke the one rule of the Pandemonium! That map was pilfered! Stolen!
textByHash.6d50b271b6d3433e190632abfabdd61ab2dc744c: Not a lot, I'm afraid. You should hoist your sails and go speak to Ribs instead. It was his map they looted. He's the old dog over in the corner. Avast!
textByHash.b466c41e02f67222bf1732314834f26584233835: The scallywag sailor returns! Have you come for a drink? We only have the best here on the Pandemonium!
textByHash.45c397d9779a4d177bd0ec688b9e06bd7f1e8cc0: Those plundering seadogs! Did you speak to Ribs about them? It was his map they looted. He's the old dog over in the corner.
textByHash.daa6b68e1865504e5afd4d61732f8e65d5a2bce4: Aye! Someone handed it in earlier. Here you go.
textByHash.b8a26e4b87876095fe6b0ee2b0bbd7c0246e1015: Blistering barnacles! You don't seem to have room for it. You'd better come back later.
textByHash.296477395e65cebfb555558b50875d779c77ff51: Those plundering seadogs! Did you speak to Ribs about them?
textByHash.e790665884358dca0fff9d90fb9832da20f9ebd4: Ah, the curse of Barnacle Barnaby! It's one of Ribs' favourite tales. Just a myth of course, but the old dog does love his stories.
textByHash.2068248ac154dd1193ce5742b5d8ec00287f58eb: Yo ho ho! A mighty good decision! It's a generous bounty indeed. You don't go breaking the one rule of the Pandemonium and expect to get away with it!
textByHash.f0a1e593bb210b4a0bedb7a3225e1e6114331ced: Avast! The mainland kingdoms have no authority here. Their laws do not apply. Instead, we just have our one rule that keeps the Pandemonium afloat: Never disrespect your fellow patron.
textByHash.448a4c0b768464fe586486aa05e206cc532806df: We don't care who you are. Indeed, pirates and customs officers can enjoy a drink here, side by side. Savvy?
textByHash.cfd467772a8b74d70418acf1aaa4914b3aa35a9a: Shiver me timbers! I'm afraid not. Old Grog said he might try and track them down. Perhaps he has an idea of where to find them.
textByHash.263276cd47adb6fd73d6c2d602bfd74ffe2c3e76: Ah, the old scallywag left not that long ago, but he'll be back here before long. He enjoys a drink far too much! In the meantime, you should hoist the sails and ready your vessel!
textByHash.709453e75ad2595149c9e6e30510d30fbabbfdda: What? But then how did you get here?
textByHash.5e20d4fdc9115cef5dbf232af4026aac4639f2a4: Blistering barnacles! Well, you won't be getting far without a boat of your own. You should head to the docks and speak with Junior Jim, our local shipwright. He'll get you sorted out.
textByHash.d0a144b2bd2c94f5afc4d20c0b31e0de678e72f0: Aye! Old Grog hasn't returned yet, but I'm sure he'll be back soon. In the meantime, you should head to the docks and speak with Junior Jim, our local shipwright. He'll get you sorted out with a boat of your own.
textByHash.f74dfa1ff8fbe3d8e0d61ff3045ecd8f9d45e6e2: Aye! This Jolly Roger here is pretty keen to see some justice dealt! Old Grog, meet... er...
textByHash.54b46b340727e9d9af84c6f0ae8521a94d34a026: Yo ho ho! Best you not waste time! Belay your helm and abaft your rigging! Get out there and make sure you're ready for Old Grog!
textByHash.ef45a9ec8d122d5551a80be647ea45f8cb633e3e: To help you on your way, I've got some pirate looty here for you! Sawmill coupons! Useful if you want a top vessel like mine.
textByHash.8bbb0fce489c7847841ebcf803da703d8ae07b83: Oh, and don't forget to pop back for a drink from time to time. My rum is to die for! Now, avast!
textByHash.1d08a36899548fd9decf2f08d1694ac12f561151: Well, it just so happens that I'm looking for a rough, tough, piratical type for an adventure on the high seas!
textByHash.f2907f342b1a9776805541b6560216f44612ea3e: Hoist your mast, , because there's some pirate looty just begging to be uncovered in a far off land! Thanks to me, you could be one of the privileged few to get your hands on it!
textByHash.f66de967fb017e169cc31fa6f1312d84bc80d346: Shiver me timbers! There is a crate full of high value goods just sitting at the port of Sarim!
textByHash.cdf0b8da6ab98be047e3c0baaa48a462f46c8a1d: Aye! The far off land of Sarim!
textByHash.fd35aef8348ede3c674e3cbc63830a7b1c3b76f4: Luckily for us, a cunning Jolly Roger of a pirate has disguised it to look like a normal crate of cargo!
textByHash.909ee4312f11f513e2b88e2105b55486829fe554: Normal?! Normal?! What kind of scallywag are you? There's nothing normal about a valuable crate of precious plundered pirate looty!
textByHash.8ac27192b5414a31dcd7b4ed5b08bfc308188456: Besides, you've already said you'll do it, and pirates never go back on their word.
textByHash.8734fed6a03c46f2c92d8e7424a2518cc7d44090: Me hearty goes out to you! Once you have the looty, just leave it with the port master here. Now, give me your log and I'll write out the details.
textByHash.54e2bb8f06b6c253358b16586cb2484f613f4298: Well, go get it sailor! Heave to!
textByHash.23349d316db5e813d4c40e0df9048d53eb62e5f5: Bit of a problem, I'm afraid! It seems your log is already full! You should get some of this work done before you take on my critical pirate task!
textByHash.027bab474a8fd55a090ef941191ac400bb9fcb11: Now, get to it, sailor! Heave to and ballast your grog!
textByHash.77cedf2763ab69107149154663f6eb78b039e35b: Aye! Hoist your mast, , because there's some pirate looty just begging to be uncovered in a far off land! Thanks to me, you could be one of the privileged few to get your hands on it!
textByHash.624fb43e00bb5d98350922980fc4b91e0a3200c5: Aye! You need to collect the pirate looty from the port of Sarim! Once you have it, just leave it with the port master here. Now, give me your log and I'll write out the details.
textByHash.a8892b229f122943fae16f25e954cd8ffe262664: Aye! You need to collect the pirate looty from the port of Sarim! Once you have it, just leave it with the port master here. Heave to, sailor!
textByHash.b0eea2a07ff5c7f6ad51f066414da519a3c7513c: Aye! I see you have the pirate looty! You need to leave it with the port master. Heave to, sailor!
textByHash.e04d20535ea9400c82785425fa2ccb50b83638f7: Shiver me timbers! That was fast!
textByHash.ef8c5d2423685bf5e3f711294c7cfb2fa25bfdcd: Blistering barnacles! You thought that was it? You are too funny, fellow sailor!
textByHash.39c5b392fb55769fc638830fed9639791d8de3ef: Aye! This is no ordinary crate. This is a pirate crate! Only a special key can open it for us!
textByHash.0f712d39aea35af227393b90d87a9512ef78dde9: I hope you're not trying to call Squawking Steve Beanie a liar?! That crate is pirate looty, and anything suggesting otherwise is clearly a plot by my rival pirate captains!
textByHash.55f5e15446d993bedbda2f815786ad0fdfd18315: It is something very few can forge! I suspect we will require the help of a master scallywag smith!
textByHash.7a756c3ebc561c530d7f242e75d163c3bcf8ce7d: A dwarf? Yarr! That's an acceptable compromise! Ready your port side and go see this dwarf!
textByHash.f4883f0c157a9a2f6d20952b492bc34fdaef3444: Do you have our special key yet?
textByHash.8f7173488662a8df1e638ef2fbb1c556aebbf6ab: Then ready your port side and go see that dwarf!
textByHash.bd672abfa0a1bebb5a691e8e25f90c605adaae27: Stop! We aren't ready to open that yet!
textByHash.f4bacb18cad332272211748028c15f1af763014a: Aha! There she crows! This is perfect!
textByHash.11afcce6282b9c14d9ecaeb8ecc5556f09cd5d44: An artifact of this power needs a test before we try it on our precious looty!
textByHash.37a3673d44fd8ea02d95e9240751ae0d4bf6eee1: I noticed a crate of grog floating around by the north westmost island of the Pandemonium. Cast off your keel and sail your vessel over there.
textByHash.b961d6ea97dfd319c5c6f7ede89e08e0c7d81380: Well, you open it with your new key and sample the contents, of course.
textByHash.2a3c959bf4b426c72bc16f2903a740387e005fdb: I'm a true pirate, so I know good grog when I see it. As for why, no sailor has truly experienced the sea until they have drunk everything it has to offer.
textByHash.2005a62e646f635cc2e04d01d28a27b0f4b67a18: In fact, you should keep a log of it all. I know I do!
textByHash.24cc505a2ddbf03d7c84f2bf1a322bfff97eb1af: Have you sampled that grog yet, sailor?
textByHash.4742e60d6008eb58fe12f6b897b985edf850917c: I saw it floating around by the north westmost island of the Pandemonium. Cast off your keel and sail your vessel over there.
textByHash.7b8dccd709940ca1a3f6cec4192a23b5e9a23843: Well, then get to it, you scallywag! Make sure you do it on your vessel as well. It's important to feel that sea air while trying a new drink.
textByHash.94467a02aa8e7441f34d975878cb77348642e755: Ah, blistering barnacles! I did forget to mention that does sometimes happen.
textByHash.d69ece7784b113c2c6ec6dd58129c4d94958b34b: Of course! You are the captain after all, my first mate!
textByHash.d806057cb93c9f730596fba687a934cccb7fcaf9: Go ahead! You are the captain after all, my first mate!
textByHash.2df25801aab3ff5a0c3a84211fd99fb7cdc60be2: Your looty, sailor! Take as many as you like.
textByHash.9f07f8466b1e763cf7f3432595668b480f354bc8: Now, with your new looty in hand, you're ready to take on the seas like never before! Soon you'll be as great a sailor as me! Speaking of which, you're not still using that raft, are you?
textByHash.61171684fcfddb970b7c54861825d169da516d0b: Well, I think it's about time you sort yourself out with an upgrade! You should check in with Jim. I'm sure he'll have something fitting. Now, avast!
textByHash.36ee8794c2d816007ea12e2d9d03010c08ea02d6: Nothing yet, you scallywag, but keep checking in. I'm sure he'll have something soon. Now, what will it be?
textByHash.b06bddce3b646ac7a649221f681bca91c870a754: Yarr! You've got it! Now, what will it be?
